title: LDShadowLady's Chicken Dungeons Rebrushed
description: adds four evil chicken variations in dungeons.
body:
This mod adds four evil chicken variations.

- Robot Chicken
- Demon Chicken
- Rainbow Chicken
- Nether Chicken

 

The Chickens spawn in themed dungeons which are rarely generated in the Overworld. The dungeons contain loot but they are guarded by the aggressive chickens.

Collect all the special chicken eggs to craft a powerful chicken sword.

This is an unofficial fan continuation. Not affiliated with LDShadowLady. ✨
